narrative:
Washington Twp township has 2,171 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
